com.lattice.edge - package com.lattice.edge
Edge configuration and backpressure policies for bounded graph handoffs.
com.lattice.graph - package com.lattice.graph
Static graph construction, lifecycle, compiled plan metadata, and source specialization contracts.
com.lattice.metrics - package com.lattice.metrics
Live graph, stage, edge, wait, and placement metrics exposed for operational inspection.
com.lattice.nativeaccess - package com.lattice.nativeaccess
Experimental native topology and placement accessors used when the optional Linux JNI backend is loaded.
com.lattice.placement - package com.lattice.placement
CPU, CPU-set, NUMA, and memory-placement configuration for stage workers and edge storage.
com.lattice.routing - package com.lattice.routing
Routing primitives for dispatch, broadcast, partition, and stamp-correlated joins.
com.lattice.slab - package com.lattice.slab
Reference-counted slab-pool helpers for explicit payload ownership.
com.lattice.stage - package com.lattice.stage
Stage logic, output, emitter, batching, exception handling, and stage worker configuration types.
com.lattice.wait - package com.lattice.wait
Wait policy configuration for producer and worker progress loops.
